description: Bottom part of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Containing a request to deliver letters to the Nezer (= Natan b. Shemuʾel?) and al-Raḍiyy, as well as a request to buy for Yosef a nice dust-colored homemade mantle (jubba jayyida rahja ʿamal al-dār... takūn malīha jayyida...). Abū ʿImrān al-Kohen al-Beḥir is to help the addressee with this purchase. (Information in part from Goitein's index cards).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
